pages.raw_text:
The picayune methods Of the
Washington Water Power Co. Is
exemplified in many ways, but none
SO surely as in the street lighting.
The lights are lit on the north Of
the N. P. tracks fully 80 minutes
before those on the south of the
tracks, and no lights are on until it
is almost impossible to see.


The recent lighting contract
made with the company does not
stipulate just when streets shall be
lit UP except that they shall be
Tit" during darkness. In many
instances they are not lit during
darkness. Lights come on north
of the tracks between 1880 and 8
o'clock, and south Of the city any
time thereafter. 1t gets dark now
about o'clock and the company,
persuant to the contract, is bound
to light the streets Immediately it
gets dark.


Complaint has been lodged with
the board Of works.
